case_title: JOHN TSANG VS. JOHN W. LAU

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSANG, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LAU, JOHN W. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY TSANG, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, JOHN W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE: IFP) SERVED NOV-10-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, JOHN W.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---DOROTHY WONG. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
